steps.title: Use the cloud-cover clue
steps.content: Unpredictable shifts in cloud cover and haze would cause solar energy collection to rise and fall. Stored energy can help when collection is inconsistent.

steps.title: Eliminate illogical phrases
steps.content: Choice A suggests developments, not changes in amount. Choice C refers to calibrations, which does not fit energy collection caused by weather. Choice D refers to incentives, which are not caused by cloud cover and haze. The answer is B.
